channel.title: EM on CONMAJIA
channel.description: Recent content in EM on CONMAJIA

item.title: 4-1 Audio MUX and Stereo Speaker
item.description: 4-1 audio multiplexer initiated on May 12, 2020, codename EM22. Stereo speaker initiated on , codename EM21-A. Figure 1 EM21-A and EM22 These two devices were made to enjoy audio contents from multiple analog sound sources. EM22 selects output channels and EM21-A amplifies the selection and outputs them via two built-in loudspeakers, or directly via a 3.5mm panel headphone jack. Switching between audio channels requires only a simple press on either of the four green buttons on EM22, fairly easy.

item.title: 1A Lithium Battery Charger
item.description: codename EM10 Lithium battery is one of the most commonly used power sources in amateur projects, especially in handheld devices. Under this scenario, an efficient full-featured yet low-profile battery charger which can be easily and transparently embedded is the ultimate requirement for a part selection consideration. TP4056 from Top Power ASIC® is such a candidate. This tiny chip is an all-in-one, full featured, integrated solution supporting up to 1 ampere current lithium battery charger and costs less than $0.
